style_authority.note: Reads the product as a calm, repeatedly used operations sheet whose motion preserves task context and direct manipulation.

reference_selection.note: Selects motion quality, interaction physics, transform ownership, accessibility, property cost, interruption, and browser-device validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Questions motion purpose first, keeps causal drag and settle feedback, and rejects transition-all, layout movement, scale, long ease-in travel, and input lockout.

evidence_level.note: Labels the result static-source only and declines to claim smoothness, frame rate, computed styles, touch feel, Reduced Motion behavior, or interruption outcomes.

verified_boundary.note: Separates explicit code facts from unverified lag, grab jumps, layout cost, animation conflicts, frame drops, pointer capture, and physical touch feel.

design_moves.note: Provides eight strong moves but leaves the pointer-session cancel lifecycle and snap hysteresis less explicit than the expected implementation findings.

scope_control.note: Stays read-only, motion-specific, prioritized, and within the 150-line cap at 145 logical lines, with five blockers and eight moves.
